description: Create comprehensive 4-panel provenance figure: domain architecture, motif alignment, annotation conflict, and evidence summary
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 12))

# Panel A: Domain architecture with stop codon and mutations
ax1 = axes[0, 0]
ax1.set_title("A. CASP12 Domain Architecture & Inactivating Mutations", fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# Mouse Casp12 (419 aa)
y = 0.75
ax1.barh(y, 419, height=0.18, color='#E8F5E9', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.8)
ax1.barh(y, 92, left=0, height=0.18, color='#4CAF50', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.8)
ax1.plot([249], [y], 'g^', markersize=10, zorder=5)
ax1.plot([296], [y], 'g*', markersize=12, zorder=5)
ax1.plot([316], [y], 'gD', markersize=7, zorder=5)
ax1.text(-25, y, 'Mouse Casp12\n(419 aa, ACTIVE)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='green')
ax1.text(249, y+0.12, 'SHG', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='green')
ax1.text(296, y+0.12, 'QACRG', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='green')
ax1.text(316, y+0.12, 'ATAD', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='green')

# Human CASP12 full-length (341 aa)
y = 0.45
ax1.barh(y, 341, height=0.18, color='#FFF3E0', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.8)
ax1.barh(y, 92, left=0, height=0.18, color='#FF9800', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.8)
ax1.plot([172], [y], 'rx', markersize=10, markeredgewidth=2, zorder=5)
ax1.plot([220], [y], 'r*', markersize=12, zorder=5)
ax1.text(-25, y, 'Human CASP12\nfull-length\n(341 aa, rare)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='#E65100')
ax1.text(172, y+0.12, 'SHS\n(mutated!)', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(220, y+0.12, 'QACRG', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='darkgreen')
ax1.text(237, y-0.12, 'ASAD\n(ATAD lost)', ha='center', fontsize=6, color='red')

# Human CASP12 truncated (124 aa)
y = 0.15
ax1.barh(y, 124, height=0.18, color='#FFEBEE', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.8)
ax1.barh(y, 92, left=0, height=0.18, color='#F44336', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.8)
ax1.plot([125], [y], 'ks', markersize=10, zorder=5)
ax1.text(135, y, 'STOP (rs497116)', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(-25, y, 'Human CASP12\ntruncated\n(124 aa, common)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='red')

ax1.set_xlim(-120, 440)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 0.95)
ax1.set_xlabel('Amino acid position', fontsize=9)
ax1.set_yticks([])
ax1.legend([mpatches.Patch(color='#4CAF50'), mpatches.Patch(color='lightblue')], 
           ['CARD domain', 'Peptidase_C14'], loc='upper right', fontsize=8)

# Panel B: Active site motif alignment
ax2 = axes[0, 1]
ax2.set_title("B. Active Site Motif Conservation", fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax2.axis('off')

alignment_data = [
    ("Rat Casp12", "S H G", "green", "Q A C R G", "green", "A T A D", "green", "Active (autoprocess)"),
    ("Mouse Casp12", "S H G", "green", "Q A C R G", "green", "A T A D", "green", "Active (autoprocess)"),
    ("Human CASP1", "S H G", "green", "Q A C R G", "green", "—", "gray", "Active (general)"),
    ("Human CASP3", "S H G", "green", "Q A C R G", "green", "—", "gray", "Active (general)"),
    ("Human CASP4", "S H G", "green", "Q A C R G", "green", "—", "gray", "Active (general)"),
    ("Human CASP12", "S H S", "red", "Q A C R G", "green", "A S A D", "red", "INACTIVE"),
]

headers = ['', 'Catalytic His', '', 'Catalytic Cys', '', 'Autoprocess', '', 'Status']
y_pos = 0.92
ax2.text(0.02, y_pos, 'Caspase', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center')
ax2.text(0.22, y_pos, 'SHG box', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center', color='darkblue')
ax2.text(0.42, y_pos, 'QACRG', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center', color='darkblue')
ax2.text(0.60, y_pos, 'Auto-site', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center', color='darkblue')
ax2.text(0.78, y_pos, 'Status', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center', color='darkblue')

for i, (label, shg, shg_c, qa, qa_c, auto, auto_c, status) in enumerate(alignment_data):
    y = 0.82 - i * 0.12
    is_human_casp12 = 'Human CASP12' == label
    
    label_color = 'red' if is_human_casp12 else 'black'
    label_weight = 'bold' if is_human_casp12 else 'normal'
    
    ax2.text(0.02, y, label, fontsize=9, fontfamily='monospace', color=label_color,
             fontweight=label_weight, transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center')
    
    bbox_shg = dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.2', facecolor='#FFCDD2' if shg_c=='red' else '#C8E6C9',
                    edgecolor=shg_c, linewidth=1.5)
    ax2.text(0.25, y, shg, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace', fontweight='bold',
             transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center', bbox=bbox_shg, color=shg_c)
    
    bbox_qa = dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.2', facecolor='#C8E6C9', edgecolor='green', linewidth=1.5)
    ax2.text(0.43, y, qa, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace', fontweight='bold',
             transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center', bbox=bbox_qa, color='green')
    
    bbox_auto = dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.2', 
                     facecolor='#FFCDD2' if auto_c=='red' else ('#C8E6C9' if auto_c=='green' else '#E0E0E0'),
                     edgecolor=auto_c, linewidth=1.5)
    ax2.text(0.62, y, auto, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace', fontweight='bold',
             transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center', bbox=bbox_auto, color=auto_c)
    
    status_color = 'red' if 'INACTIVE' in status else 'green'
    ax2.text(0.78, y, status, fontsize=8, transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center',
             color=status_color, fontweight='bold')

# Panel C: GO annotation conflict
ax3 = axes[1, 0]
ax3.set_title("C. GO:0004197 Annotation Conflict", fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax3.axis('off')

conflict_text = """GO:0004197 — cysteine-type endopeptidase activity

IBA (enables)               vs    IKR (NOT|enables)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━    ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Source: PAINT phylogeny            Source: PMID:12054529
        (GO_REF:0000033)                   (Fischer et al. 2002)

Method: Inherited from             Method: Key residue analysis
        caspase ancestor                   (SHG→SHS mutation)

Basis:  CASP12 is in the           Basis:  Multiple deleterious
        caspase family                     mutations destroy
                                           catalytic competence

Flaw:   Does NOT account           Strength: Directly addresses
        for lineage-specific                 the specific gene's
        gene inactivation                    catalytic capacity

VERDICT: IBA is OVER-ANNOTATED
         IKR NOT correctly captures the biology
         The IBA annotation should be removed
"""

ax3.text(0.02, 0.95, conflict_text, fontsize=8, fontfamily='monospace',
         transform=ax3.transAxes, va='top', ha='left',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#FFF9C4', alpha=0.9))

# Panel D: Evidence summary
ax4 = axes[1, 1]
ax4.set_title("D. Evidence Weight Summary", fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

categories = ['Sequence\n(SHG→SHS)', 'Genetic\n(stop codon)', 'Biochemical\n(no substrates)', 
              'Functional\n(non-catalytic)', 'Structural\n(AlphaFold)', 'Database\n(UniProt)']
weights_against = [5, 5, 4.5, 4, 3, 4.5]  # Evidence AGAINST endopeptidase activity
weights_for = [0.5, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0]  # Evidence FOR (only QACRG conservation)

x = np.arange(len(categories))
width = 0.35

bars1 = ax4.barh(x + width/2, weights_against, width, color='#EF5350', label='Against activity', alpha=0.8)
bars2 = ax4.barh(x - width/2, weights_for, width, color='#66BB6A', label='For activity', alpha=0.8)

ax4.set_yticks(x)
ax4.set_yticklabels(categories, fontsize=9)
ax4.set_xlabel('Evidence Strength (0-5)', fontsize=9)
ax4.set_xlim(0, 5.5)
ax4.legend(fontsize=8, loc='lower right')
ax4.invert_yaxis()

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('casp12_comprehensive_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Comprehensive figure saved")
